# name: #   name, method, path, expected_status, assertions, payload, auth_bearer
# expected_status: single (200) or pipe-separated (200|404) for degradation
# payload: JSON body for POST; use $var for substitution; "-" for no payload
# auth_bearer: variable name for Bearer token; "-" for no auth
# Register → Login → Me → Refresh → Logout → post-logout checks
# Post-logout: old refresh token should be revoked (session revoked)
# RBAC: user token on admin-only endpoints → 403 (audience mismatch)
# Admin Auth Flow (requires dev seed admin on backend — gracefully degrades)
# Backend must read DEV_ADMIN_EMAIL / DEV_ADMIN_PASSWORD and seed on startup.
# Until then these return 401 (user not found) and degrade gracefully.
